path_errors.expected_path: existing file or directory matching glob prefix

validation_notes: No YAML parser library (js-yaml/yaml) nor Python is available in this environment; YAML validation is structural-only (tabs-in-indentation + empty-file). Full semantic parse validation is recommended in CI where a parser is present.
Reference scanning ignores fenced code blocks (```...```) in task/rule .md files so that illustrative CLI examples are not counted as real dependencies.
Orchestration pseudo-agents (system/user/auto) and documentation placeholder handles (@agent, @agent-name, @import, @nome-do-agent) are whitelisted and not reported as broken agent references.
Rule files (.claude/rules/*.md) are filename-loaded context rules, not entity definitions, so name/description frontmatter is intentionally not required of them.
